title: Ligne Claire
description: Ce style émule l'esthétique emblématique de la bande dessinée européenne des années 70 et 80, caractérisée par des contours à l'encre noire nets et uniformes en 'ligne claire' et un pointillisme complexe pour la texture. Il présente des aplats de couleurs aux tons pastel avec des dégradés de ciel fluides et vastes, créant une atmosphère sereine et rétro-futuriste avec des détails mécaniques et organiques minutieux.
description_en: This style emulates the iconic European bande dessinée aesthetic of the 1970s and 80s, characterized by crisp, uniform 'ligne claire' black ink outlines and intricate stippling for texture. It features flat, pastel-hued color fills with smooth, expansive sky gradients, creating a serene, retro-futuristic atmosphere with meticulous mechanical and organic detailing.
description_fr: Ce style émule l'esthétique emblématique de la bande dessinée européenne des années 70 et 80, caractérisée par des contours à l'encre noire nets et uniformes en 'ligne claire' et un pointillisme complexe pour la texture. Il présente des aplats de couleurs aux tons pastel avec des dégradés de ciel fluides et vastes, créant une atmosphère sereine et rétro-futuriste avec des détails mécaniques et organiques minutieux.
prompt: Digital illustration mimicking the iconic European sci-fi bande dessinée ink and color aesthetic of the 1970s and 80s. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The artwork is built on a foundation of crisp, unvarying, thin black ink outlines that meticulously define every contour, boundary, and geometric form. Within these strict borders, apply flat, localized color fills using a muted yet vivid pastel palette dominated by {{primary_color}} and {{secondary_color}}. The lighting is highly ambient and flat, avoiding harsh directional chiaroscuro; instead, volume and depth are suggested through subtle cel-shaded tonal shifts and, most importantly, intricate ink detailing. Employ meticulous fine stippling, delicate cross-hatching, and small ink dashes to indicate surface texture, mechanical wear, rugged terrain, and organic irregularities. The background features smooth, flawless, expansive color gradients—often sweeping from {{primary_color}} to {{secondary_color}}—creating a vast, serene, and contemplative atmosphere. Use strategic pops of {{accent_color}} to draw the eye to key structural or organic focal points. The overall spatial dynamic emphasizes expansive, layered depth with distinct foreground, midground, and background planes separated by atmospheric perspective and color temperature shifts. The edges of all subjects remain razor-sharp and perfectly contained by the ligne claire ink work. The image MUST occupy the absolute ENTIRE dedicated space as a canvas rule: NO borders, NO frames, NO white margins, NO canvas edges, FULL BLEED to all four corners. bande dessinée, ligne claire, vintage sci-fi illustration, thin black ink outlines, intricate stippling, flat pastel color fills, smooth gradient skies, ambient flat lighting, retro-futuristic aesthetic, highly detailed line art, full bleed, edge-to-edge, no border, no frame

The edges of all subjects remain razor-sharp and perfectly contained by the ligne claire ink work, interacting cleanly with the {{background_color}}, explicitly allowing intentional overflow where parts of the {{subject}} can extend beyond the visible frame (cropped by the image boundaries). bande dessinée, ligne claire, vintage sci-fi illustration, thin black ink outlines, intricate stippling, flat pastel color fills, solid backdrop, ambient flat lighting, retro-futuristic aesthetic, highly detailed line art
background_prompt: An expansive, serene retro-futuristic landscape mimicking vintage European bande dessinée aesthetics. The scene features rolling, rugged terrain defined by thin black ink outlines and intricate stippling, bathed in flat, ambient light. A vast, flawless sky gradient transitions smoothly, dominating the upper half. The palette relies on muted pastel tones of {{primary_color}} and {{secondary_color}}, with subtle textural accents in {{accent_color}}. The environment emphasizes deep atmospheric perspective and quiet stillness, completely devoid of foreground subjects.
background_prompt_removebg: An expansive, serene retro-futuristic landscape mimicking vintage European bande dessinée aesthetics. The scene features rolling, rugged terrain defined by thin black ink outlines and intricate stippling, bathed in flat, ambient light. A vast, flawless sky gradient transitions smoothly, dominating the upper half. The palette relies on muted pastel tones of {{primary_color}} and {{secondary_color}}, with subtle textural accents in {{accent_color}}. The environment emphasizes deep atmospheric perspective and quiet stillness, completely devoid of foreground subjects. This scenic backdrop is framed by a decorative, geometric tech-noir border drawn in crisp black ink, placed in the foreground to create depth. The entire composition, including the landscape and the ornamental frame, transitions cleanly into a flat {{background_color}} surface at the outer edges.
